[[File:3rd age felling axe detail.png|left|150px]]
The '''3rd age felling axe''' is a type of [[felling axe]] requiring an [[Attack]] level of 65 to be equipped, and a [[Woodcutting]] level of 61 to be used. Players can create the axe by using a [[felling axe handle]] on a [[3rd age axe]] while having a [[hammer]] in their inventory and standing next to an [[anvil]]; this process is '''irreversible''', but the felling axe itself remains tradeable.

3rd age felling axes will chop at the same speed as a normal 3rd age axe. If the player is carrying [[forester's ration]]s however (either in the inventory or inside a [[forestry kit]]), they will receive 10% more Woodcutting experience each time they successfully chop a tree and gain a 20% chance not to receive logs when chopping trees (or [[Tree roots (Forestry)|tree roots]] in the [[Forestry#Rising_Roots|Rising Roots]] forestry event), at the cost of consuming one ration. This also results in a 20% chance to not receive [[anima-infused bark]] from tree roots.

If the player has no rations on their person, the felling axe will function like a regular 3rd age axe.

{{Costume storage|treasure chest}}

==Special attack==
The 3rd age felling axe has a [[special attacks|special attack]], ''Lumber Up'', that it shares with the [[Dragon axe|dragon]], [[Infernal axe|infernal]], [[3rd age axe|3rd age]], and [[Crystal axe|crystal axes]] and their variants. It [[Temporary skill boost|temporarily boosts]] the player's [[Woodcutting]] level by 3, consuming 100% of the player's special attack energy. The boost degrades every 60 seconds, with the player's Woodcutting level returning to normal after 3 minutes. Using [[Preserve]] can increase the duration by 50%.

The special attack can be used to allow players to chop with the axe itself starting at level 58 Woodcutting, although it cannot be used without the level 65 [[Attack]] required to wield the axe.

Note that any levels boosted above 99 with the special attack will be treated as 99. Therefore, you will start to receive diminishing returns with the special attack at level 97 and 98{{CiteTwitter|author=Mod Ash|url=https://twitter.com/JagexAsh/status/1375844352098975753|date=27 March 2021|archiveurl=https://reldo.runescape.wiki/i/98237|archivedate=29 March 2021}}, with visible boosts past level 99 only influencing the [[Pet#Skilling pets|pet]] and [[clue nest]] chances.{{CiteTwitter|author=Mod Ash|url=https://twitter.com/JagexAsh/status/1573018832998109185|date=22 September 2022|archiveurl=https://reldo.runescape.wiki/i/102590|archivedate=10 June 2023|quote=The formula for dropping clue nests only benefits from visible boosts. So the +7 invisible one won't help, but a visible boost would help beyond 99 if you can get one.}}

==Changes==
{{Subject changes header}}
{{Subject changes
|date = 1 November 2023
|update = Forestry Tweaks, Security & More
|change = A bug in which the XP bonus from felling axes did not correctly stack with the [[lumberjack outfit]] has been fixed.
}}
{{Subject changes
|date = 25 October 2023
|update = Forestry: Part Two
|change = 
* The item was made obtainable and [[members]]-only.
* The item was renamed from "3rd age 2h axe" to "3rd age felling axe".
* The item's weight was increased from 1.36 kg to 1.814 kg.
* The item's [[value]] was increased from 161 to 55,000.
* The item's examine was changed; previously, it was "''A beautifully crafted axe, shaped by ancient smiths.''"
}}
{{Subject changes
|date = 28 June 2023
|update = Forestry: The Way of the Forester - Part One
|change = The item was added to the game cache, but was unobtainable.
}}
